title: Under the Armor
relevance_summary: Social media manipulation and reputation-based attacks

prevention.rule: Block any governance proposal that references ambiguous statements made after the proposal was initiated.
prevention.trigger: GOVERNANCE_PROPOSAL -> mentions ambiguous statements after proposal initiation

red_flags: Ambiguous statements used to manipulate governance processes
monitoring_rules: Block any governance proposal that references ambiguous statements made after the proposal was initiated.
summary: A governance attack was attempted where a user manipulated the narrative around ambiguous statements to pressure the team into breaking protocol. A guard could have blocked such proposals by monitoring for references to ambiguous statements made after the proposal was initiated.
